horses.name: 1. Cinnamon Twist (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Like a perfect blend of flavors - this colt is seasoned with Conkanno power!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam Fairytale represents mare family 31, the Elmarina family. She is a **performance mare who was awarded a jumping premium at her young horse test. Her first offspring; Cookie Dough (by Conthargos), sold at SWB's Elite Foal Auction in 2019, she won the 4-year-old final at Elmia and has achieved placements in international 130 jumping with Ebba Danielsson.

The grand-dam Sambuca VH (by Santa Cruz VDL) is a **performance mare with placements in 135 jumping. 

The great-granddam Cupea VH* is an Elite mare, she produced Candy VH (by Cabachon), victorious in the 7-year-old final in Reims with Erika Lickhammer and has merits in international 145 showjumping. She also produced Hot Cup VH (by Blue Hors Hotline) with victories in CCI4* eventing and selected for the European Championships in 2021 with Aminda Ingulfson, Cruzan VH** (by Santa Cruz VDL) received a jumping premium at the young horse test as both a 3- and 4-year-old and later placed in 140 jumping, Caol Ila VH (by Ci Ci Senjor Ask) received a jumping premium at her young horse test and later achieved merits in 130 jumping, as well as Cara Mira VH** (by Carson Ask) who received a jumping premium at her young horse test and was awarded Elite in 2020.

This promising young stallion is by the legendary Conthargos, whose offspring include 69 approved sons such as Conthinder and Continental Blue, both successful at the 1.60m level. Other standouts include Cocolina, Conthargo-Blue, Conbelleza, Cosa Nostra, and Concona.
Conkanno’s dam, Chacjana, also produced Mecanno PS and Contrast Blue PS, both excelling in international young horse classes. His granddam, Siljanna, produced Chacanno JRA (by Chacco-Blue) and Chuck Bass (by Centadel), both competing internationally at 1.60m, as well as the approved stallion Cha-Kanno PS (by Chacoon Blue).

SWEDISH
Modern Fairyta

horses.name: 2. Horsepartners Sky (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Light and expressive – Skyline To B power meets Van Vivaldi elegance!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam, Svea, has a dressage breeding index of 139 and was awarded 9s for trot and canter at her young horse test. Her offspring, Horsepartners Mr. Glam (by Glamourdale), was sold at the SWB Elite Foal Auction 2023 for €20,000.

The grand-dam, Joyce, was awarded a premium in dressage as a three-year-old and was awarded Elite status based on her progeny's achievements. She produced Odd Molly (by Laurentio), with placings at M-level B level dressage, as well as Hope (by Total Hope), Vera Wang BG (by Bon Coeur), and Max Mar BG (by Benefit), all awarded a premium in dressage as three-year-olds.

The great grand-dam, Sinara, is entered in the Oldenburg Main Studbook and produced Landmaid (by Lovis Corinth), with competition success in 1.40m show jumping.

Skyline to B is the stallion who took the world by storm! He won the Breeders Trophy as both a 3- and 4-year-old, and as a 5-year-old, he finished fourth in the final of the World Young Horse Championships with Carl Hedin in the saddle, scoring an impressive 88%. At the age of 6 in 2024, he competed in the FEI introductory program, achieving an outstanding 96%. That year, Skyline to B also topped the statistics as the most used stallion in SWB. During the same year, he placed in Prix St. Georges competitions with his German owner Yara Reichert. His offspring are still very young, but the foals have shown excellent quality, with some fetching top prices at auctions. His sire, Blue Hors St. Schufro, has won Grand Prix Kür with scores over 81% and has several approved sons as well as competitive offspring progressing to higher levels.

The option to have the foal stay with the breeder after weaning is available


SWEDISH
Modern Svea har ett dressyrindex på 139 och belönades med 9or på trav och galopp vid sitt unghästtest. Avkomman Horsepartners Mr. Glam (e. Glamourdale) s

horses.name: 3. Rapace LVST
horses.catalog_text:
Sharp, alert, athletic – Racoon and Springbank II VH spark in one colt!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam, Ascensia (5) SWB, was awarded a premium in dressage and achieved an impressive 52 points as a three-year-old. She is a *** performance mare with a dressage breeding index of 149, descending from mare family 5, a powerful maternal line that has produced numerous successful dressage horses.

The grand-dam, Adelaide, is an Elite Mare who received a premium in dressage as a young horse and holds a dressage index of 143. She has competed up to M-level dressage and produced A Cappella (by Connaisseur), a Breeders Trophy competitor, and Adelinde (by Dream Boy), awarded a premium in dressage as a 3- and 4-year-old, now competing successfully at M-level B. She also produced Ascona (by Secret), awarded a premium in dressage.

The great-granddam, Mint, has competed at S-level dressage with Pernilla André Hokfelt and is also an Elite Mare. She produced Barcelona (by Bombay), competing at M-level B, and Miami (by Master), an A-graded mare. Miami's daughter Aquila (by Quite Easy) was awarded a premium in dressage at her young horse test, competed in Breeders Trophy, and has performed up to Intermediaire I level. Mint also produced Arezzo (by Rubinrot), which was awarded a premium in dressage and competed at Intermediaire I, and Akleja (by Akribori), competing at the M-level in dressage. Mint's son Adriano (by Don Primero) received a premium in dressage as a three-year-old, placed in Breeders Trophy, and was later exported to the USA, competing successfully up to Intermediaire I, and is now an approved and licensed stallion in SWANA.

Racoon placed fifth in the 5-year-old final at the 2022 World Young Horse Championships with 8.82 points, including 9.0 for trot, suppleness, and future potential. He was then purchased by Lövsta Stud, immediately appealing to Swedish breeders, and has been one of the most used dressage sires in

horses.name: 4. Lamé de la Kenda (F. 4) (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Olympic dreams start here - this pritty filly will jump for gold!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam DiaKenda represents the prestigious mare family F.4, the Gakenda family. She is a ***performance mare with a jumping index of 133. DiaKenda has produced Cornkenda and Cornorado (both by Cornet Obolensky), who were sold at SWB's Elite Foal Auctions in 2019 and 2020, respectively. 

The grand-dam Carkenda is a **performance mare who received a jumping premium at the young horse test as both a 3- and 4-year-old. She placed in the Breeders Trophy in jumping as a 4-, 5-, and 6-year-old. She has produced Kannkenda (by Kannan) in 140 jumping and Agenda (by Al Cantino) in 135 jumping. 

The great-granddam is the Elite mare Torkette. Seven of her offspring were awarded premiums at young horse tests, many as double talents in both gaits and jumping. Torkette also produced Carlizio (by Cardento) and Emkenda (by Emmerton), both finalists in the Breeders Trophy, Em'erald (by Emmerton), with placings in 130 jumping, as well as Concerto (by Cardento) with placings in M- level dressage, and the Elite mare Con Cett (by Cardento). 

At a relatively young age, Comthago VDL has already secured numerous placings in 5* 1.60m classes with Dutch rider Hessel Hoekstra. He combines the genetics of the phenomenal Comme Il Faut with a high-performance Holsteiner dam line. Comme Il Faut, successful with Marcus Ehning, is sired by the world-leading Cornet Obolensky, already among the top showjumping sires at a young age, while his dam is the legendary Ratina Z. The granddam Joyce I (by Caretino) competed at the highest level with both Jörg Kreutzmann and USA’s Laura Kraut. Comthago was reserve champion at his stallion performance test in Mecklenburg.


SWEDISH
Modern DiaKenda representerar den anrika stofamiljen F.4, Gakenda-familjen. Hon är ett *** prestationssto och har ett hoppindex på 133. DiaKenda har lämnat Cornkenda och Cornorado (båda

horses.name: 5. Blue Tango CTL (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Tangelo and Mr. Blue sets the rhythm – this colt was born to dance over fences!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam, Gift of Mr. Blue, competed in international 150 jumping with the British rider Alice Watson. 

The grand-dam Praline K placed in 140 jumping and produced Fan of Mr Blue (by Zirocco Blue) in 140, and Honour to Mr. Blue (by Mr. Blue) in 145 jumping. 

The great-granddam Bosmanta produced Kosmanta (by Frühling) in 150 classes and Osmanta A (by Peter Pan) in 145 jumping classes.

Tangelo van de Zuuthoeve is a highly reliable sire of jumpers and is currently ranked 29th on the WBFSH sire ranking for show jumping, with more than 50 offspring competing at 1.60–1.70m. Some of his most successful offspring at 1.60 m include Tobago Z, Darry Lou, Hermelien vd Hooghoeve, Etalon, Calypso van de Zuuthoeve, Warrior, and Venus – and the list goes on! Tangelo himself competed at top level before starting his breeding career, passing on valuable jumping blood from his sire, the French top stallion Narcos II. He also carries highly desirable Thoroughbred blood in the second generation through the legendary stallion Laudanum xx, a legend both in sport and in international breeding.

The option to have the foal stay with the breeder after weaning is abailable

SWEDISH
Modern Gift of Mr. Blue har gått internationell 150 hoppning med brittiskan Alice Watson. 

Mormodern Praline K har placerat sig i 140 hoppning och har sedan lämnat Fan of Mr Blue (e. Zirocco Blue) i 140, Honour to Mr. Blue (e. Mr. Blue) i 145 hoppning. 

Mormorsmor Bosmanta har lämnat Kosmanta (e. Frühling) i 150-klasser och Osmanta A (e. Peter Pan) i 145 hoppning.

Tangelo van de Zuuthoeve är en extremt säker hoppförärvare och ligger för närvarande på 29:e plats på WBFSHs fadershingstranking för hoppning med över 50 avkommor i 160-170-hoppning. Ett axplock av de mest framgångsrika avkommorna på 160-nivå är Tobago Z, Darry Lou, Hermelien vd Hooghoe

horses.name: 6. BE Waterloo (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Modern sport horse genetics at their finest – this gelding is bred to conquer tomorrow’s arenas!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam, BE Wavelet, represents mare family 71. She was awarded a premium in dressage as a three-year-old, is a **performance mare, and has a dressage breeding index of 127.

The grand-dam, Alice, is an A-graded mare from mare family 71 and by the Grand Prix stallion Dalwhinnie. She produced BE Allex (by Ampere), sold at the SWB Elite Auction. BE Allex received a premium in dressage as a three-year-old, placed second in the Breeders Trophy for 4-year-olds with Jeanna Högberg, and was scored 10 for rideability by test rider Cathrine Dufour. BE Allex represented Sweden at the World Young Horse Championships for three consecutive years, winning the first qualifier last year and the small final this year. Alice also produced four other offspring, which were sold at the SWB Elite Foal Auction.

The great-granddam, Akribola, is an A-graded mare and produced Sir Acteur (by Sir Oldenburg), who competed successfully in M-level B dressage.

Devin Franco GJ (SWB) was the winner of the 2024 performance test and has consistently ranked among the top stallions in Sweden for breeding statistics. He earned Premium Stallion status already as a 3-year-old with high marks and won the SWB Stallion Trophy later that year. His first foal crop was born last year, immediately establishing him as one of the most successful sire stallions in foal inspections across the country. His sire, Vivino, was Premium Stallion in Hanover and later also in Danish Warmblood. Vivino scored 888 in his 35-day test, placing fourth in a highly competitive field and won the qualification for the Danish Young Horse Championships with Thomas Sigtenbjerggaard in the saddle. Vivino has 15 approved sons from a relatively small number of offspring.


SWEDISH
Modern BE Wavelet representerar stofamilj 71. Hon belönades med gångartsdiplom som t

horses.name: 7. Eira F (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Her extraordinary grace is echoing elite potential - to make her yours by being fast and determined!

ENGLISH
The dam, Enya, is by Ehrenpreis, sire of multiple Grand Prix dressage horses. Enya was purchased at the Westphalian Elite Foal Auction and produced Edguy F (by Hesselhöj Donkey Boy), with placings at M-level B dressage, and Ebbot F (by Fortnite), sold at the SWB Elite Foal Auction 2021.

The great-granddam, Delphine (by Delphi), produced Artemis (by Florestan I), successful in Grand Prix, and Petite Plaisir (by Pelegrinus), with placings in M-level dressage. Her daughters also produced offspring that competed successfully up to S-levels in both dressage and showjumping. The licensed stallion Valverde comes from this line.

Söbakkehus First Mover comes from one of Denmark’s strongest dam lines. His granddam, Söbakkehus Mia Bella, won the Danish 4-year-old Championship and then competed successfully at Grand Prix. Her daughters have produced three approved stallions: Söbakkehus First Mover, Hesselhöj Double Up, and Hesselhöj Gnags, the latter being a Premium Stallion and the second most expensive stallion ever at the Herning auction (€125,000). Söbakkehus First Mover’s full sister was named Mare of the Year in Danish Warmblood in 2024. His sire, Blue Hors Fifty Cent (by Franziskus), was a Premium Stallion in Danish Warmblood and highly successful in young horse competitions, scoring 95.4% in a qualifying class as a 4-year-old.


SWEDISH
Modern Enya är efter Ehrenpreis, som lämnat ett flertal avkommor i Grand Prix dressyr. Enya är inköpt till Sverige på Westfalens Elitfölauktion. Hon har lämnat Edguy F (e. Hesselhöj Donkey Boy) som har placeringar i medelsvår B dressyr samt Ebbot F (e. Fortnite) som såldes på SWBs Elitfölauktion 2021.

Mormors mor Delphine (e. Delhpi) har lämnat Artemis (e. Florestan I) som har placeringar i Grand Prix dressyr samt Petite Plaisir (e. Pelegrinus) med placeringar i Medelsvår dressyr. Hon har också lämnat döttrar som

horses.name: 9. Millerts Rioresse (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
She's got the look – don't miss out on this top prospect for the future!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The grand-dam Tweety has produced Zelana (by Celano) with placings in 140 jumping, as well as Hilton (by Oscar) with merits in CCI4* eventing. 

The great - granddam Cunieta produced Wonderful (by Lake Bid) in 145 jumping, Zakkenroller (by Elmshorn) in 130 jumping, as well as Domingo III (by Derrick) in Grand Prix dressage.

Approved at the Swedish Stallion Performance Test in 2023, Janeiro de Bieville impressed with his exceptional ability, rhythm, balance, forwardness, and his bold and cooperative nature. Test riders praised him for his superb rideability and for maintaining a high level of focus on his task.
His sire, Balou du Rouet, has produced an extraordinary legacy: 128 approved sons, 92 offspring competing at 1.60m, 2 in Grand Prix dressage, and 5 in 5* eventing. Janeiro’s dam, Andalie de Bieville, also produced Hornet de Bieville (by Cornet Obolensky), who qualified for the French Young Horse final as a 5-year-old.

The option to have the foal stay with the breeder after weaning is available

SWEDISH
Mormodern Tweety har lämnat Zelana (e. Celano) som har placeringar i 140 hoppning samt Hilton (e. Oscar) med meriter i CCI4* fälttävlan.

Mormors mor Cunieta har lämnat Wonderful (e. Lake Bid) i 145 hoppning, Zakkenroller (e. Elmshorn) i 130 hoppning samt Domingo III (e. Derrick) i Grand Prix dressyr.

Janeiro de Bieville premierades under det svenska bruksprovet 2023. Några av de fina omdömena han fick var bland annat, stor kapacitet, god rytm, balans och framåtbjudning samt samarbetsvillig och orädd. Testryttarna tyckte även dom att han gav ryttaren en väldigt bra känsla och han var fokuserad på sin uppgift. Janeiro de Bieville’s far, Balou du Rouet har själv lämnat inte mindre än 128 godkända söner, 92 avkommor i 160-hoppning, 2 i Grand Prix dressyr samt 5 avkommor i 5* fälttävlan. Hans mor, Andalie de

horses.name: 10. Powers VH (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
We proudly present this colt with protential written all over him - make him all yours!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam, Obsession VH, was awarded a premium in dressage as a three-year-old. She is a *** performance mare with a dressage breeding index of 145, representing mare family 31, a powerful maternal line that has produced numerous successful competition horses, premium mares, and licensed stallions over several decades. Her daughters Verdicchia VH (by Vivino) and Succession VH (by So Perfect) were both awarded a premium in dressage at young horse tests. Bellissima VH and Belissima II VH (by Be Sure) were sold at the SWB Elite Foal Auction.

The grand-dam, Darling II VH, was awarded a premium in dressage as a three-year-old and has achieved Elite status through her progeny. She is a *** performance mare with an outstanding dressage breeding index of 158. Her eldest offspring, Mr Grey VH (by Grey Flanell), received a premium in dressage and won the Breeders Trophy as both a 4- and 5-year-old. She also produced the licensed stallion Rosebank VH 1469 (by Revolution), who was runner-up in the Breeders Trophy as a 4-year-old and now competes in the USA with Grand Prix rider Katie Duerrhammer. Rossese VH (by Revolution) received a premium in dressage at the young horse test, and Mr Grey II VH 1521 (by Grey Flanell) was licensed as a premium stallion at this year's performance test.

The great-granddam, Dakarta VH, was awarded a premium in dressage as a three-year-old and is an Elite Mare. She is also a *** performance mare with a dressage index of 148. Among her eleven offspring is Darcia VH (by Danone I), who was awarded a premium in dressage and has competed in international Grand Prix dressage with Jeanna Högberg. Four additional offspring received a premium in dressage, including Singleton VH (by Blue Hors Hotline), competing at Prix St. Georges, and Dufftown VH (by Dalwhinnie), competing at M-level. Darling VH

horses.name: 11. Lavici QRE (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
A striking colt with excellence in every stride - you are 100% sure of real dressage stardom!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam Supernova produced Ventus QRE (by Blue Hors Viconte) who was sold at SWB Elite Foal Auction 2023.

The grand-dam, Winetta, was awarded the Verbandspremie in Oldenburg. She produced three licensed sons, including Dragon Heart (by Dreseman), competing at Grand Prix dressage, and Fiego M (by Florestan I), competing at M- level dressage. She also produced Der Felix (by De Niro), competing in M- level A dressage.

The great granddam, Ballerina, produced Donnizetti S (by Donnerhall), successful at Grand Prix dressage, and Diva (by Donnerschlag), competing at M- level dressage.

Straight Horse Leonardo was named Premium Stallion in Denmark as a 3-year-old and subsequently placed second overall in the multi-day test. He was awarded a silver medal by Danish Warmblood and won the Aage Ravns Prize for Best 4-Year-Old Danish-Bred Horse in 2024, with scores over 90%. His granddam, Straight Horse Zackonik, competed successfully at international Grand Prix level and is a full sister to Glock’s Zonik N.O.P., who competed successfully in international Grand Prix dressage for many years with Edward Gal and Hans Peter Minderhoud. In this pedigree, we also find Blue Hors Santiano, a successful stallion and competition horse. His sire, Lord Europe, is a Premium Stallion in Denmark.


SWEDISH
Modern Supernova har lämnat Ventus QRE (e. Blue Hors Viconte) som såldes på SWBs Elitfölauktion 2023.

Mormodern Winetta har tilldelats Verbandspremie i Oldenburg. Hon har lämnat tre godkända söner, där Dragon Heart (e. Dreseman) har tävlingsmeriter i Grand Prix dressyr och Fiego M (e. Florestan I) tävlar i medelsvår dressyr. Hon har också lämnat Der Felix (e. De Niro) som tävlat till och med medelsvår A dressyr. 

Mormors mor Ballerina har lämnat Donnizetti S (e. Donnerhall) som tävlat i Grand Prix dressyr samt Div

horses.name: 12. Odessa (70) (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Opoque beauty with the softness of Suarez – a filly made to shine!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam, Sunshine, descends from mare family 70. She was awarded a premiumin dressage as a three-year-old and holds a dressage breeding index of 136.

The grand-dam, Delta, is an A-graded mare. She is the dam of the approved stallion Sudooro 1478 (by Suarez), finalist in the Breeders Trophy for 5-year-olds and successful at M-level B dressage. Delta also produced So Precious, who received 87.2% at the foal inspection and subsequently won the South Swedish Foal Championship in 2023.

The great-granddam, Mercedes, is an Elite mare. She produced Sundown 1526 (by Suarez), an approved stallion and finalist in the Falsterbo Folksam Open last summer, also representing Sweden at the World Breeding Championships for Young Horses in Verden with Johan Svensson. Mercedes also produced Zurprise (by Zuidenwind), participant in the Breeders Trophy and competitor at Prix St. Georges level, as well as Sunrise (by Suarez), awarded a premium in dressage at the young horse test.

Opoque had an outstanding three-year-old season, being named Premium Stallion at the stallion approvals in both the Netherlands and Denmark. He went on to a 21-day test in the KWPN, scoring 85.5 with high marks for his powerful gaits and rideability. Opoque won his class at the World Young Horse Championships for 4-year-olds and was selected to represent the KWPN in 2024. His dam, Ice Princess STH, competed successfully up to M-level dressage, and four of her siblings have achieved results up to Prix St. Georges. Further back in the dam line, we find the stallion Blue Hors First Choice. His sire, All at Once, an Ampere son, competes in international Grand Prix dressage and participated in both the Tokyo and Paris Olympics with Yessin Rahmouni.

SWEDISH
Modern Sunshine härstammar ur stofamilj 70. Hon belönades med gångartsdiplom som treåring och har ett dressyrindex

horses.name: 13. Ellmitage Flip-W (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Pedigree with show jumping guarantee - this colt will jump like a butterfly!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam Ninja Flip Z represents mare family 74, the Bon Bon xx family. She is a ***performance mare with merits in 150 jumping and a high breeding index for jumping of 144. 

The granddam is the legendary Butterfly Flip***, who in 2003 was ranked by FEI as the world's top showjumper. Her list of merits, together with Malin Baryard Johnsson, is long, including team silver at the European Championships in 2001 and World Championships in 2002, bronze in the World Cup Final in Las Vegas 2003, team silver at the Sydney Olympics in 2004, several World Cup qualifier wins, and Grand Prix wins all over the world, to name just a few. Butterfly Flip produced Flip's Little Sparrow (by Cardento) who, together with Stephanie Holmén, won the World Cup qualifier in Zurich 2018 and achieved numerous top placements in international 160, Flip's Fairytale (by Click and Cash) in 150 jumping, Vigo's Flip de Muze Z (by Vigo d'Arsouilles) in 145 jumping and CCI3* eventing, Elle Flip de Muze Z in 140 classes, Naughty Flip de Muze (by Norton D'eole) in 135 jumping, as well as Flip's Angeleye (by Cartier) and Next Flip de Muze (by Nabab de Reve) in 130. Butterfly Flip was awarded Elite status in 2019 and has a breeding index of 146. 

The great-granddam Baderna xx also produced an offspring competing in M-level jumping.

Ermitage Kalone is the stallion everyone is talking about, who has captured hearts with both his fantastic presence and, above all, his dazzling jumping, masterfully produced by Belgian rider Gilles Thomas. At the European Championships in La Coruña, the still young stallion demonstrated incredible scope, lightness, capacity, and attitude – precisely what the show jumpers of the future need to meet the sport’s challenges. His pedigree carries some of the very best showjumping genetics: his sire, Catoki, successfully combined

horses.name: 14. Reason to Believe (SWB)
horses.sire: filly by Mosito van het Hellehof
horses.catalog_text:
Eyes on the prize - this one is set to conquer the world stage!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam Magic is a **performance, awarded a jumping premium at her young horse test. 

The grand-dam Cirieka Z produced Cavada Z and Clintano Z (by Clintissimo Z) in 130 jumping, as well as Zirco Z (by Zandor Z), approved for breeding in Zangersheide. 

The great - granddam Reurika Z has produced Faust Z (by Furioso II), who is approved in Hannover and KWPN and has merits in international 160, Leon and Lauriston Z (both by Leuthen I) approved in Oldenburg with merits in 160 jumping, Cheurano Z (by Chellano Z) with merits in 145 jumping and approved in Zangersheide, as well as Cita Z (by Caretano Z) and Simply Great Z (by Seclusive xx) in 145 jumping.

Mosito van het Hellehof is one of the first approved sons of Elvis ter Putte and one of Belgium’s most promising stallions, with placings in international 1.60m classes. He comes from a strong dam line, with his dam, Hadise van het Hellehof (by Nabab de Rêve), also producing the approved stallion Kasper van het Hellehof, successfully ridden by McLain Ward (USA). Offspring from Mosito’s first foal crop (2016) are already competing on the international circuit, such as Quinoa de la Liniere, Qnokke de Muze, Qosito van de Koekoek, and Qoup de Coeur de Muze. Mosito has also sired several approved sons in the Netherlands, Belgium, and France.

The option to have the foal stay with the breeder after weaning is available

SWEDISH
Modern Magic är ett **prestationssto som tilldelades hoppdiplom vid sitt unghästtest. 

Mormodern Cirieka Z har lämnat Cavada Z och Clintano Z (e. Clintissimo Z) i 130 hoppning samt Zirco Z (e. Zandor Z) i som är godkänd i Zangersheide. 

Mormors mor Reurika Z har lämnat Faust Z (e. Furioso II) som är godkänd i Hannover och KWPN och har meriter i internationell 160, Leon och Lauriston Z (båda e. Leuthen I) godkända i Oldenburg och med meriter 160 hoppnin

horses.name: 15. Djonte LVST (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Monte Carlo spark and Janeiro Platinum flair unite in one flashy colt!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam, Djane, received a premium in dressage at the young horse test and is a **performance mare with a dressage index of 134. Her pedigree boasts many of Europe's top producers of dressage horses. She produced Djamie (by Proud James), sold at the SWB Elite Foal Auction 2024.

The grand-dam, Danya, is by the German breeding stallion De Niro, entered in the Hannover Main Studbook, with a Swedish dressage index of 130. Her offspring, Danlin (by Franklin) and Djovia (by Jovian), were winners in foal championships and sold at the SWB Elite Foal Auctions 2019 and 2021, respectively. Damourelle (by Glamourdale) sold at the SWB Elite Foal Auction 2023. Her daughters, Djane (by Janeiro Platinum) and Danira (by Franklin), received a premium in dressage at the young horse test.

The great-granddam, Diandra, is entered in the Hannover Main Studbook. Her offspring, My Storyteller (by Sandro Hit), won at M-level A dressage, and Vailulu (by Van Vivaldi) was awarded a premium in dressage.

The Dream Boy son, Blue Hors Monte Carlo, combines exceptional performance with a first-class pedigree. His relatives include several Grand Prix horses, such as his sister, Iron Lady, and his dam’s brother, Bolero, who achieved long-standing international success with Morgan Barbançon. Monte Carlo himself made headlines by competing at the international small tour level as a 7-year-old, winning in his debut. Earlier highlights include a finalist placing in Denmark as a 4-year-old with 89.6%. His sire, Dream Boy, has been a cornerstone of Dutch dressage, having earned multiple championship medals with Hans Peter Minderhoud. He has produced more than 25 licensed sons and numerous Grand Prix horses.

The option to have the foal stay with the breeder after weaning is available

SWEDISH
Modern Djane fick gångartsdiplom vid unghästtest, är ett ** pr

horses.name: 16. Blue Lotus Ek (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Blooming with elegance - this colt has all you need!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
This is the first offspring of the dam Sweetheart Ek. 

The grand-dam Jordan Ek produced Joker Ek (by I'm Special de Muze), awarded a jumping premium at both his young horse test and riding horse test, and later placed in international 150 jumping together with Joel Torstensson. 

The great - granddam Victoria of the Lowlands produced Victorias Secret Ek (by Cartier) awarded a jumping premium at her young horse test, Daniel Ek (by Diabeau van de Heffinck), a finalist in the 5-year-old showjumper class in Falsterbo and later achieved merits up to 130 m, Las Vegas Ek (by Lord Z) who placed in 145 jumping, and Diego Ek (by Zorro), sold at the Swedish Selected Horse Sales jumping horse auction for 3-year-olds in 2014.

Cero Blue TN descends from one of the highest-performing dam lines in Germany. His outstanding pedigree goes back to the world-famous mare Fein Cera. His granddam Zera (by Cero I) won the Hamburg Derby in 2017 with Argentine rider Pato Muente. Zera’s granddam is the legendary Fein Cera, ridden by American rider Peter Wylde. Fein Cera’s dam, Cera, also jumped at the 1.60m level with Paul Darragh and Otto Becker. Cero Blue’s sire, Chacoon Blue, completed his stallion test in Schlieckau in 2014 with an excellent score of 9.4 in jumping. At six years of age, he won the Dobrock Jumping Championships and was a finalist at the German Young Horse Championships. He has already produced several approved sons, including Chacoolou PS, Chaloubino PS, Rocco vd Bisschop, and Caribbean Blue, approved at the SWB stallion test in 2023.

Cero Blue TN kommer från en av de mest högpresterande mödernelinjerna i Tyskland. Han fantastiska stamtavla går tillbaka till det världsberömda stoet Fein Cera. Cero Blues mormor, Zera (e. Cero I) vann bland annat Hamburg Derbyt 2017 med den argentinske ryttaren, Pato Muente. Zeras mormor är den berömda Fein Ce

horses.name: 17. Cristalls Rocamadour (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
San Amour brilliance - this filly will turn heads and win both hearts and victories!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
This is the first offspring of the dam Isakas Rhaya. The dam, Isakas Rhaya, has a dressage index of 127.

Venturo was named Premium Stallion in Hannover and comes from an extraordinary dam line. His dam competed successfully at S-level dressage, and his granddam competed internationally at Grand Prix with Isabell Werth, while his great-granddam also competed at Grand Prix. Venturo is still very young but has already performed exceptionally. He was the highest-rated stallion at the 2024 sport test in Münster-Handorf with 9.19 points, scoring 9 for trot and canter, 9.8 for rideability, and 9.5 for overall impression. His sire, Valdivani, is also young but has already produced nearly ten approved sons. He competes successfully at S-level dressage and has a full sister at Grand Prix level, as well as two other siblings at S-level.


SWEDISH
Detta är modern Isakas Rhayas första avkomma. Modern Isakas Rhaya har ett dressyrindex 127. 

Venturo blev utsedd till premiehingst i Hannover, och har ett möderne utöver det vanliga. Modern har själv tävlat svår klass dressyr, och mormor har tävlat internationell Grand Prix dressyr med Isabell Werth, samt mormors mor även hon Grand Prix dressyr. Venturo är själv väldigt ung, men har redan presterat exceptionellt. Han var högst bedömda hingsten på sportprovet i Münster-Handorf 2024 med 9,19 i poäng, där han fick 9 för trav och galopp, 9,8 för ridbarhet och 9,5 i allmänt intryck. Hans fader, Valdivani, är även han ung, men har redan lämnat närmare ett 10-tal godkända söner, själv tävlat svår klass dressyr och en syster i Grand Prix dressyr, och två andra syskon i svår klass dressyr.

horses.name: 18. Elwira F (40) (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Refined and athletic – Sambucci de Muze and Elmshorn in harmony!

ENGLISH
The dam Edelweiss WL represents the mare family 40, the Släaröd family. She has merits in 150 jumping and a breeding index for jumping of 128. Edelweiss WL has produced Tingeling WL (by Tornesch) in 135 jumping. 

The grand-dam Raclette is an Elite mare and has produced Qing WL (by Quite Easy) who was awarded full marks 10-10 for his jumping and received a jumping premium at his young horse test, Cayenne (by Cortez) in 145 jumping, Filipin (by Feliciano) in 135 jumping, Leonora in M- level eventing, as well as the approved stallion Vallon 1013 in Grand Prix dressage. 

The great-granddam Yaki Lee produced the approved stallion Corrado WL 919 (by Cortez), who has merits in Grand Prix dressage.

The young and talented Sambucci de Muze descends from one of Belgium’s leading dam lines. His dam Malissa de Muze competed up to 1.60m with Italian rider Lorenzo de Luca. His granddam Cordula de Laubry is dam to no less than seven Grand Prix horses, including the approved stallions Fantomas de Muze and Lector van den Bisschop. His great-granddam, Nikita de Laubry (by Skippy II), jumped at the Grand Prix level and competed at the European Championships in 1999 and 2003, as well as the World Equestrian Games in Jerez in 2002. His sire Hunter’s Scendro has produced several approved sons and talented jumpers. Sambucci de Muze is a modern sport stallion who has already proven himself on the show circuit, winning the stallion competition final in Den Bosch in both 2024 and 2025, and a finalist at the Young Horse World Championships in Lanaken as both a 5- and 6-year-old. He also scored an impressive 88 points at the KWPN stallion performance test.

SWEDISH
Modern Edelweiss WL representerar stofamilj 40 Släaröd-familjen. Hon har meriter i 150 hoppning ett avelsindex för hoppning på 128. Edelweiss WL har lämnat Tingeling WL (e. Tornesch) i 135 hoppning. 

Mormodern Raclette är premierad Elit och ha

horses.name: 19. Euphorious (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Full of joy – Escamillo fire and Franklin flair in one stunning filly!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam, Flawlous, is a **performance mare with a dressage index of 126. She produced Industrious (by Iron), sold at the SWB Elite Foal Auction 2021, awarded a premium in dressage, and Religious (by Revolution), awarded a premium in dressage at the young horse test.

The grand-dam, Serious, produced Achous (by Apache), successful at M-level A dressage, and Scandalous (by Skovens Rafael), who was awarded a premium in dressage as a three-year-old and went on to win at M-level B.

The great granddam, Wounder xx, is an Elite Mare and * performance mare, producing Particious (by Pablo) and Zous (by Blue Hors Zack), both competing at M-level B dressage, as well as D’Amorous (by Danone I), awarded a jumping premium and competed at M-level B, and Joyous (by Johnson), awarded a premium in dressage.

Escamillo is a modern Grand Prix stallion with success in both competition and breeding. He was a silver and bronze medalist at the World Young Horse Championships, a finalist in the Nürnberger Burg-Pokal, and has wins in Intermediaire II. He debuted as Premium Stallion in Verden in 2017, winning his performance test with a score of 9.36 points. At the 2021 World Young Horse Championships, he received up to 9.5 for gaits and rideability. Escamillo has sired 40 approved sons, including the premium stallion Energy, as well as Escaneno, Escanto PS, and Expectation PS. His dam, Cassila, is a full sister to two approved stallions, one of whom competes at Grand Prix level. The pedigree traces back to the prestigious Cinderella line, which has produced Grand Prix horses and breeding icons such as Sir Heinrich OLD, Radondo, and C-Dur.

SWEDISH
Modern Flawlous är ett ** prestationssto med ett dressyrindex på 126. Hon har lämnat avkommorna Industrious (e. Iron) som såldes på SWBs Elitfölauktion 2021 och tilldelats gångartsdiplom som treåring

horses.name: 20. BE Casino (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Casino luck meets proven power – a future winner in every sense!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam, Fröken Silvia, was awarded a premium in dressage. She is a *** performance mare with a dressage breeding index of 137. She produced BE Springsteen (by Springbank II VH), who received a premium in dressage as a three-year-old. The daughter, BE Fröken Beatrix (by Be Sure), sold at the 2024 SWB Elite Foal Auction.

The grand-dam, Fröken Bernadotte, is an Elite Mare with a dressage index of 135. Among her offspring are Smilla, Sandiego, and Sandro, three full siblings by Sandakan; they have all competed successfully up to M-level dressage. Sandro also placed at the 2023 European Children's Championships with Milla Blomqvist.

The great-granddam, Fröken Maud, is an Elite Mare. Her daughters, Lemona (by Lemon) and Malou (by Labrador), have achieved Elite status through the merits of their offspring. Fröken Maud also produced After Eight (by Ragazzo), which achieved multiple placings in 130 show jumping, as well as Oblix (by Sandakan) and Fröken Akila (by Akribori), both competed in M-level dressage.
The damline has been maintained by the breeder for over 50 years, producing numerous elite mares and top-level competition horses up to Grand Prix.

The crowd favorite, Blue Hors Viva Vegas, was named Premium Stallion at the Munich licensing. At the 2024 Danish Warmblood licensing, he was crowned Champion Stallion, confirming expectations with a commanding victory in the Danish 35-day performance test later that spring. He scored 892 points, including 9–9.5 for canter, rideability, and future potential. His granddam, Fräulein Smilla, is the full sister to the licensed stallion Floris, and her full sister Fatme is the dam of the premium stallion Lautrec and the licensed Zion Incredible E. His sire, Viva Gold, is a Vivaldi son from the Weihegold dam line and has already produced over 15 approved sons, including champion stallions

horses.name: 21. Epona's Libra (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
A filly with untamed potential - this one is born to jump!

EMBRYOTRANSFER
Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy
Embryotransfer

ENGLISH
The dam CCStud's Nigeunerin sold at SWB's Elite Foal Auction 2018. She has produced Epona's Taurus (by Cornet Obolensky), who sold at SWB's Elite Foal Auction 2023. 

The grand-dam Ageunerin VDL was awarded Elite in 2018 and has a breeding index for jumping of 130. She has produced CCStud's Sawgrass (by Querlybet Hero), sold at SWB's Elite Foal Auction 2023, CCStud's Kruezerin (by Cordess) in 150 jumping, CCStud's Jetset (by Monte Bellini) in 145 jumping, Ginerin CC (by Stokdals Livanos) in 140 jumping, as well as CCStud's Fidelity (by Monte Bellini), approved in Oldenburg, and with merits in international 150 jumping. Ageunerin VDL also produced three offspring awarded a jumping premium at young horse tests. 

The great-granddam Zigeunerin produced the KWPN and Selle Français-approved stallion Goodtimes (by Nimmerdor), as well as Mercedes (by Nimmerdor) in 150 cm jumping, and Bigenderin VDL (by Silverstone) in 140 cm jumping.

Favorit Ask was named the undisputed champion stallion in the class for 5-year-old and older stallions at the Danish Stallion Licensing in Herning, after winning his 35-day test with an outstanding score of 901.5. He was described as a very modern stallion with interesting bloodlines, long legs, and exceptional capacity. Among his offspring are Folsom, QH Miss Potter do Santo Antonio, First Choice HT, and Hennie Ask – all competing at international 1.60m level. His dam Ukase ter Putte also produced the approved stallion Elvis ter Putte, who competed up to 1.60m and has produced several international 1.60m horses, including the approved stallion Mosito van het Hellehof.

SWEDISH
Modern CCStud's Nigeunerin såldes vid SWBs Elitfölauktion 2018. Hon har lämnat Epona's Taurus (e. Cornet Obolensky) som såldes vid SWBs Elitfölauktion 2023. 

Mormodern Ageunerin VDL tilldelades Eli

horses.name: 23. Chia af Hagalund (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
A spicy filly – Ermitage Kalone with the crunch of Cornet Obolensky!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam, Scilla Hagalund, produced Allium af Hagalund (by Cardento) and Bellis af Hagalund (by Uricas vd Kattevennen), both of which were sold at SWB's Elite Foal Auctions in 2023 and 2024, respectively. 

The grand-dam Quidame Springs R.S. produced Cornflow (by Cornet Obolensky) in international 150 jumping, Cornflakes (by Cornet Obolensky) in 145 jumping, and Diamond Spring (by Diamant de Semilly) in 130 jumping. 

The great-granddam W-Cassia RS produced Indora F Z (by Indorado) in 140 jumping, Kathleen R.S (by Kalaska de Semilly) and Daria R.S (by Diamant de Semilly) in 135 jumping, as well as Newport R.S in 130 jumping.

Ermitage Kalone is the stallion everyone is talking about, who has captured hearts with both his fantastic presence and, above all, his dazzling jumping, masterfully produced by Belgian rider Gilles Thomas. At the European Championships in La Coruña, the still young stallion demonstrated incredible scope, lightness, capacity, and attitude – precisely what the show jumpers of the future need to meet the sport’s challenges. His pedigree carries some of the very best showjumping genetics: his sire, Catoki, successfully combined a top-level sport career with Philipp Weishaupt and Emil Hallundbæk with an excellent record as a sire, currently ranked 23rd among the world’s best jumping stallions. Ranked No. 1 on the same list is Ermitage Kalone’s damsire, the legendary Kannan, a stallion who year after year stays at the very top thanks to offspring consistently delivering top-level results. Ermitage Kalone has already produced several approved sons in both BWP and KWPN.


SWEDISH
Modern Scilla Hagalund har lämnat Allium af Hagalund (e. Cardento) och Bellis af Hagalund (e. Uricas vd Kattevennen) som båda sålts vid SWBs Elitfölauktioner 2023 respektive 2024. 

Mormodern Quidame Springs R.S. har lämnat Cor

horses.name: 24. K Mr. Ramboo DH (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
From foal to podium - don't miss out on this colts thrilling journey to the world stage!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam, Kontica, produced Kointreau DH (by Quaterhit), who was runner-up in the Breeders Trophy for 4-year-olds in 2024.

The grand-dam, Kontiki, was awarded a premium in dressage as a three-year-old. She produced Koronis (by First Wish), awarded a premium in dressage as a young horse.

The great-granddam, Korina, received a premium in dressage as a three-year-old and later achieved Elite status based on the merits of her progeny. Among her offspring are Katzy (by Hertigen), awarded a premium in dressage as a three-year-old, and later competing in the National 3-year-old mare championships. She also received performance premiums in both dressage and jumping at her young horse test. Korina also produced Kame (by Nocturne), awarded a premium in dressage as a three-year-old and an Elite Mare.

Racoon placed fifth in the 5-year-old final at the 2022 World Young Horse Championships with 8.82 points, including 9.0 for trot, suppleness, and future potential. He was then purchased by Lövsta Stud, immediately appealing to Swedish breeders, and has been one of the most used dressage sires in recent years. During the 2024–2025 winter season, he competed successfully in Wellington with rider Caroline Darcourt, achieving results up to Intermediaire I. He is licensed in SWB and approved in several other foreign studbooks and has so far produced one approved son. His dam is a sister to two Grand Prix dressage horses and one 1.60m show jumper. His sire, Hero, competes at S-level dressage.

The option to have the foal stay with the breeder after weaning is available

SWEDISH
Modern Kontica har lämnat Kointreau DH (e. Quaterhit) som blev tvåa i Breeders Trophy för 4-åringar 2024. 

Mormodern Kontiki belönades med gångartsdiplom som treåring. Hon har lämnat Koronis (e. First Wish) som belönats med gångartsdiplom s

horses.name: 25. Nådhammars Zeb LVST (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
This stunning colt is fueld with potential - be sure to grab this oppurtunity!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam, Zavana Q, is by Blue Hors Zalabaster and descends from the renowned dressage progenitors Blue Hors Zack and Don Schufro. Zavana Q was awarded a premium in dressage, receiving 9 for her trot, and holds a dressage breeding index of 137. Her first offspring, Nådhammars Fred LVST (by Blue Hors Kingston), was awarded a foal score of 83.3%.

The grand-dam, F.A. Havana, holds a dressage breeding index of 134.

The great-granddam, Solvangs Heart, is an Elite mare in Denmark. She produced F.A. Chico Dance (by Chico’s Boy), finalist in the Danish Young Horse Championship for 5-year-olds. Furthermore, she produced F.A. Hallow (by Tailormade Temptation) and F.A. Benoni (by Benicio), both successful at M-level B dressage, with F.A. Hallow also receiving high marks at the Danish Young Horse Championship. Solvangs Heart has additionally produced F.A. High Five (by Bon Bravour), a finalist in the Danish 4-year-old Championship and later placed at M-level B dressage.

Blue Hors Baron descends from a solid dam line with a sister in Grand Prix and a licensed brother as well as numerous S-level horses in dressage. With already nine approved sons, he quickly made his mark as a sire. Since his licensing in Herning as a 3-year-old, his popularity has soared, and in 2022, he was the most used stallion in Denmark. Baron himself has competed successfully at S- level and made a strong international debut. His sire, Benicio, has competed in Grand Prix dressage and produced over 40 licensed sons, as well as numerous high-level offspring.

The option to have the foal stay with the breeder after weaning is available

SWEDISH
Modern Zavana Q är efter Blue Hors Zalabaster och har de kända dressyrförärvarna Blue Hors Zack och Don Schufro i sin stamtavla. Zavana Q har belönats med gångartsdiplom där hon fick 9 poäng för sin trav och

horses.name: 26. Old Perth VH (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Limitless potential - be sure to secure this colt to your future elite stable!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam, Fleurie II VH, represents mare family 31, a powerful maternal line that has produced numerous successful competition horses, premium mares, and licensed stallions for decades. Her offspring, Frank VH (by Franklin) and Lagavulin VH (by Straight Horse Leonardo), were sold at the SWB Elite Foal Auction.

The grand-dam, Florence VH, was awarded a premium as a three-year-old and won the National 3-year-old mare championship. She is a *** performance mare with a dressage breeding index of 144. Her eldest offspring, De Florian VH (by De Lorean), received a premium as a three-year-old, and her daughter Bfleur (by Be Sure) sold at the SWB Elite Foal Auction 2023.

The great-granddam, Rakel VH, received a premium in dressage as a young horse and has an impressive dressage index of 152. She is an Elite mare based on her progeny's achievements. Her offspring include the licensed stallion Dalwhinnie 1180, also successful in Grand Prix dressage, Hernandez VH (by Hermes) and Clynelish VH (by Connaisseur), both awarded a premium in dressage and successful up to M-level B dressage, as well as Frescati VH (by Figaro R), also competing at M-level B. Ricardo VH (by Skovens Rafael) was placed in the 7-year-old championship in dressage. Fürstin VH (by Fürstenball) received a premium in dressage and competed in the National 3-year-old mare championships. The eldest daughter, De la Reinne VH (by De Niro), is an Elite Mare and dam of the licensed stallion Springbank II VH.

Opoque had an outstanding three-year-old season, being named Premium Stallion at the stallion approvals in both the Netherlands and Denmark. He went on to a 21-day test in the KWPN, scoring 85.5 with high marks for his powerful gaits and rideability. Opoque won his class at the World Young Horse Championships for 4-year-olds and was selected to represent the

horses.name: 27. Horsepartners MyChoice (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Sire Mylord Carthago is the one that everyone yearn for - this colt is bred for show jumping greatness!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The granddam Choice has produced Flamengo Blue PS (by Je T'aime Flamenco) in international 140 jumping. 

The great- granddam Granika has competition merits in 140 jumping and has produced Lucy (by Landadel) in 160 jumping, Qui Magic (by Quidam's Rubin) in 140 jumping, Caprice (by Couleur Rubin OLD) in 135 jumping, as well as Atletica (by As di Villagana) in 130 jumping.

Mylord Carthago was an internationally successful superstar under French rider Penelope Leprevost. He qualified for the finals at the Young Horse World Championships as a 4-, 5-, and 6-year-old, and finished 4th as a 7-year-old. He was part of the silver medal-winning teams at both the World Equestrian Games in Kentucky and the European Championships in Madrid, where he also placed 7th individually. He also won the Grand Prix GCT in Vienna, the Gucci Paris Masters, the Grand Prix in Helsinki, and the Prix RMC in La Baule, among other notable titles. He is currently ranked 5th on the WBFSH sire ranking. His sire, Carthago Z, competed at the Olympic Games in both Atlanta and Sydney, and won Nations Cups in Aachen, Rotterdam, and La Baule, as well as several Grand Prix with Jos Lansink. Carthago Z sired over 160 Grand Prix horses and more than 100 approved sons. Mylord Carthago has produced numerous international Grand Prix horses and around 20 approved sons, including Valmy de la Lande, Dexter De Kerglenn, and Argan De Beliard.

The option to have the foal stay with the breeder after weaning is available

SWEDISH
Mormodern Choice har lämnat Flamengo Blue PS (e. Je T’aime Flamenco) i internationell 140 hoppning. 

Mormors mor Granika har egna tävlingsmeriter i 140 hoppning och har lämnat Lucy (e. Landadel) i 160 hoppning, Qui Magic (e. Quidam’s Rubin) i 140 hoppning, Caprice (e. Couleur Rubin OLD) i 135 hoppning samt A

horses.name: 28. SM Ozcaro (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
A show-stopping colt – Ozzy TN brilliance blended with Benetton Dream elegance!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam, Belladream S, represents mare family 71, and this is her first offspring.

The granddam, Dolly, competed in the Breeders Trophy as a 4-year-old and has been awarded Elite based on her progeny's achievements. She produced Miraculix S (by Millennium), who competed in Grand Prix dressage in Germany, and Arielle S (by Ampere), with placings at M-level dressage. She also produced Fransesco S (by Fürst Wilhelm), who competed in the Breeders Trophy, and Saga (by Sir Donnerhall), awarded a premium in dressage at her young horse test and qualified for this year's Breeders Trophy.

The great-granddam, Emilia, produced Pixar (by Prestige VDL), who competed in Grand Prix for young riders.

Ozzy TN is a young stallion from a distinguished mare line that has produced multiple approved stallions and sport horses. Among his close relatives are the Grand Prix horse Sieger Hit, the small tour horses Silver Black, Winehouse, Desiderio, and Hotshot, and the famous Fürstenball, one of the world’s most influential dressage stallions from the F-line. Ozzy TN impressed greatly at the KWPN performance test, scoring 83 overall, including 9.0 for rideability and work ethic. His sire, Asgard’s Ibiza, has produced over 30 approved sons and many successful sport horses progressing to higher levels.

SWEDISH
Modern Belladream S representerar stofamilj 71 och det här är hennes första avkomma. 

Mormodern Dolly deltog i Breeders Trophy som 4-åring och har blivit elitpremierad för sina avkommors meriter. Hon har lämnat Miraculix S (e. Millennium) som har tävlat Grand Prix i Tyskland med placering. Dolly har också lämnat Arielle s (e. Ampere) som har placeringar i medelsvår dressyr. Vidare har Fransesco S (e. Fürst Wilhelm) deltagit i Breeders Trophy och Saga (e. Sir Donnerhall) har fått gångartsdiplom vid Ridhästtest och är kvalifi

horses.name: 29. Fortum (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Strong fortune ahead – Bon Esprit with a touch of Temptation

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam, Fibula, was awarded a premium in dressage with 49.5 points as a young horse and has a dressage breeding index of 138. Her offspring, Foramen (by Fifty-Fifty), was sold at the SWB Elite Foal Auction 2023.

The grand-dam, Fiore, received a premium as a three-year-old, earning 10 points for type and 9s for all gaits. She is a *** performance mare and has achieved Elite status through the merits of her progeny. Her offspring include Revolution (by Skovens Rafael), awarded a premium in dressage, winner of both the Breeders Trophy and the Scandinavian Open in dressage, and a double finalist at the World Young Horse Championships with Anna Svanberg. She also produced F. Jugularis (by Jazz) and Fimbria (by Franklin), both awarded a premium in dressage, as well as Fascia (by Highlander), awarded a premium in dressage and successful at M-level dressage.

The great granddam, Foriana, is entered in the Oldenburg Main Studbook. Among her offspring are Fähnrich (by Fürst Heinrich) and Solano (by Sandro Hit), both with placings at M-level B dressage. The maternal line also produced the premium stallion River Dance.

Bon Esprit was named Champion Stallion in Oldenburg 2025 and went on to win his performance test the following year with a score of 8.3. He is approved in several studbooks, and his offspring have sold for high prices across Europe. His dam competed successfully at Prix St. Georges level, and the dam line has produced several top-level sport horses, including Deveraux OLD, Rolls Roys, Sambuca, Don Rovero, and Flemming. The licensed stallion Roosevelt (by Rotspon) contributes Olympic heritage to the pedigree and is known in Sweden primarily as the sire of Grand Prix horses Rolecz and Sibelius 1315, the latter also being a licensed stallion. Bon Esprit’s sire, Bon Courage, has already produced 13 approved sons and competes him

horses.name: 30. For-C key (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
This colt holds the key – Favorit Ask and Indoctro open every door!

ENGLISH
The dam Istar N (SWB) is a **performance mare who was awarded Elite status in 2023. She received a jumping premium at her young horse test, earning excellent marks of 9-9 for her jumping. She has produced Fafne N (by Favorit Ask) in 130 jumping and Vile N (by Verdi) in 140 jumping. 

The grand-dam, Caterpillar, is also an Elite mare who has produced many successful offspring in the jumping arena: Guapa N (by Guido) in 150 jumping, Io N (by Indoctro) and Onosa N (by VDL Ornamé) in 140 jumping, Tsara (by Landlord), Argos (by Ahorn), as well as Opus One (by Beach Boy) in M-level dressage.

Favorit Ask was named the undisputed champion stallion in the class for 5-year-old and older stallions at the Danish Stallion Licensing in Herning, after winning his 35-day test with an outstanding score of 901.5. He was described as a very modern stallion with interesting bloodlines, long legs, and exceptional capacity. Among his offspring are Folsom, QH Miss Potter do Santo Antonio, First Choice HT, and Hennie Ask – all competing at international 1.60m level. His dam Ukase ter Putte also produced the approved stallion Elvis ter Putte, who competed up to 1.60m and has produced several international 1.60m horses, including the approved stallion Mosito van het Hellehof.

The option to have the foal stay with the breeder after weaning is available

SWEDISH
Modern Istar N (SWB) är ett **prestationssto som tilldelades elitstatus 2023. Hon fick hoppdiplom vid sitt unghästtest med utmärkta 9-9 i betyg för sin hoppning. Hon har lämnat Fafne N (e. Favorit Ask) i 130 hoppning och  Vile N (e. Verdi) i 140 hoppning.

Mormor Caterpillar är även hon ett elitsto som lämnat många framgångsrika avkommor på hoppbanan. Hon har lämnat Guapa N (e. Guido) i 150 hoppning, Io N (e. Indoctro) och Onosa N (VDL Ornamé) i 140 hoppning, Tsara (e. Landlord), Argos (e. Ahorn) samt Opus One (e. Beach Boy) i medelsvår dressyr

horses.name: 31. First Jagger af Ekeby (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
A true rockstar – First Mover energy and Dante Weltino charm!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam, Java af Ekeby, was awarded a premium in dressage, scoring 9,5 for trot, with a dressage index of 153. Sired by the successful Dante Weltino OLD, her pedigree also includes the influential Rousseau and Jazz. Her first foal, Juli af Ekeby (by So Perfect), received high foal scores and was placed in the foal championship.

The grand-dam, Jellybean for U, sold as a foal at the SWB Elite Foal Auction, is a *** performance mare. She was awarded a premium in dressage as a three-year-old and has achieved Elite status based on the performance of her progeny. She produced Ferrione af Ekeby (by For Romance I) and Jewel af Ekeby (by Blue Hors Kingston), both awarded a premium in dressage. Kenos af Ekeby (by Knock-Out) sold at the SWB Elite Foal Auction 2022.

The great-granddam, Wosila, is an Elite Mare. Her offspring include Danisco for U (by Bocelli), who competed in the Breeders Trophy as a five-year-old and later in international Young Rider classes at Intermediaire I level with Norwegian rider Kaja Rogstad. Wosila also produced Honeycrunch for U (by Zuidenwind), awarded a premium in dressage.

Söbakkehus First Mover comes from one of Denmark’s strongest dam lines. His granddam, Söbakkehus Mia Bella, won the Danish 4-year-old Championship and then competed successfully at Grand Prix. Her daughters have produced three approved stallions: Söbakkehus First Mover, Hesselhöj Double Up, and Hesselhöj Gnags, the latter being a Premium Stallion and the second most expensive stallion ever at the Herning auction (€125,000). Söbakkehus First Mover’s full sister was named Mare of the Year in Danish Warmblood in 2024. His sire, Blue Hors Fifty Cent (by Franziskus), was a Premium Stallion in Danish Warmblood and highly successful in young horse competitions, scoring 95.4% in a qualifying class as a 4-year-old.

The option to have the foal s

horses.name: 32. Dominus i Bo (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
A young ruler – Donkey Boy strength and Valverde elegance combined!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam, Verdesse VH, received a premium in dressage at the young horse test. She is a *** performance mare with a dressage index of 140, representing mare family 31, a strong maternal line producing numerous successful competition horses, premium mares, and licensed stallions for decades. Her 2023 foal, Vesper i Bo (by Proud James), was sold at the SWB Elite Foal Auction.

The grand-am, First Delight, received a premium in dressage as a three-year-old, is a *** performance mare with a dressage index of 146, and achieved Elite status through her progeny's merits. Her offspring include Floresca VH (by Floricello), an Elite Mare, Strathisla VH (by Skovens Rafael), awarded a premium in dressage and competing in the Breeders Trophy as a 4-year-old, and Verdesse II VH (by Valverde), awarded a premium in dressage as a three-year-old, winner of the 2023 Breeders Trophy, and Swedish representative at the 2024 World Young Horse Championships in Ermelo.

The great-granddam, De la Reinne, received a premium in dressage as a three-year-old. She is a *** performance mare with a dressage index of 162 and achieved Elite status. Her progeny include Springbank VH (by Skovens Rafael), Breeders Trophy winner and Intermediaire I competitor; Springbank II VH, Danish Warmblood Champion Stallion, Breeders Trophy winner, and successful in international Grand Prix dressage with Yara Reichert; Floricella VH (by Floricello), awarded a premium in dressage and later Elite-graded; and licensed stallion Knockando VH (by Franklin).

Hesselhöj Donkey Boy won the bronze medal at the World Young Horse Championships as a 5-year-old and silver as a 7-year-old, while also winning the Danish Young Horse Championships four years in a row. He has since competed with victories at the Grand Prix level. Donkey Boy has sired numerous approved sons, including Hesselhöj

horses.name: 33. Yxebos Silver Rocket (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Ready for takeoff – Santiano lift-off will fly this colt to the top!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam, Keira, was awarded a premium in dressage as a three-year-old, holds a dressage breeding index of 140, and descends from a proven performance line featuring many prominent dressage sires. Her eldest offspring, Yxebos Silver Moon (by Törveslettens Sylvester), received a premium in dressage at the young horse test. Yxebos Silver Sky (by Kjento) was sold at the SWB Elite Foal Auction 2023 to a US buyer for €32,000. Last year's foal, Yxebos Silver Sun (by Be Sure), was Sweden's third-highest-scoring foal and sold at the SWB Elite Foal Auction.

The grand-dam, Sophie V B, has competition merits at M-level A dressage.

The great granddam, Surprise du Jour, is entered in the Oldenburg Main Studbook and is a full sister to licensed stallions Dardanos N (by Davignon) and Stoiber SN (by Sandro Hit). This maternal line has produced numerous successful dressage horses and licensed stallions.

The Sezuan son, Blue Hors Santiano, is a half-brother to the Grand Prix stallion Glock’s Zonik, who, despite having relatively few offspring, has produced around 20 approved sons and over 12 Grand Prix horses. Santiano has three other siblings competing at international Grand Prix level, including his full brother, the licensed stallion Straight Horse Sezarion. His sister Zachonik is the granddam of the premium stallion Blue Hors Leonardo. Santiano won the Pavo Cup for 5-year-olds, placed third in the KWPN performance test with 87.5 points, and has repeatedly demonstrated international quality in young horse classes and stallion competitions. His sire, Sezuan, is a three-time Champion in the World Young Horse Dressage Championships and has produced multiple world champions and Grand Prix horses.

The option to have the foal stay with the breeder afte weaning is available

SWEDISH
Modern Keira belönades med gångartsdiplom som treåring
